points.text: Stay home except to get medical care if diagnosed with COVID-19.
Call ahead before visiting a healthcare provider if you have COVID-19.
Wear a face mask before entering a healthcare provider's office and when in any room or vehicle with another person.
Cover coughs and sneezes with a tissue and regularly wash hands with soap and water.
Avoid sharing personal household items if diagnosed with COVID-19.
Stay home and away from others, including pets, if possible.
Inform your healthcare team about a positive COVID-19 test or symptoms.
Seek emergency help for severe symptoms like trouble breathing or chest pain.
Wash your hands often with soap and water for at least 20 seconds.
Avoid close contact with anyone who is sick or has symptoms.
Seek medical care early if you have symptoms like fever, cough, or difficulty breathing.
Avoid going to public places to prevent spreading the virus to others.
Keep all indoor spaces well ventilated to reduce the spread of the virus.
Wear a mask in public places where physical distancing is not possible.
Wash your hands frequently with soap and water or use an alcohol-based hand rub.
